hero.title: Where Art
hero.subtitle: Exploring the fluid beauty of Turkish Ebru marbling and the geometric precision of modern photography

philosophy.title: View & Collect
philosophy.description: Ebru art is not just a visual feast to be observed, but a touch that adds soul to living spaces. Explore the works formed by the fluidity of water on one side, and make these unique pieces a part of your life on the other.
philosophy.galleryDesc: Wander through our digital exhibition of colors dancing on water. Explore modern compositions blended with traditional techniques, where each piece is unique and unrepeatable.
philosophy.shopDesc: Bring the mesmerizing atmosphere of Ebru art into your home or office. Browse our collection of original artworks and own a unique piece of living art.

about.title: About the Artist
about.intro: I am an artist who bridges worlds—the ancient and the contemporary, the fluid and the structured, the organic and the geometric.
about.para1: Through the centuries-old Turkish art of Ebru marbling, I explore the unpredictable beauty of water and pigment. Each piece is a meditation on impermanence and the acceptance of what emerges from chaos.
about.para2: My photography practice complements this fluidity with deliberate composition—finding poetry in architecture, light, and negative space. Where Ebru embraces spontaneity, photography demands intention. Together, they form a dialogue about control and surrender.
about.para3: Based between tradition and innovation, I create work that invites contemplation and celebrates the duality of the creative process.
about.quote: Art is not about perfection—it's about presence. It's about showing up to the blank page, the still water, the empty frame, and trusting what wants to emerge.

ebru.title: Ebru Art
ebru.subtitle: The ancient Turkish art of water marbling, where each piece is a unique conversation between pigment, water, and time

artworks.title: Tides of Teal
artworks.description: A dance of teal and coral pigments on water, creating organic ripples that mirror ocean waves.

artworks.title: Golden Flow
artworks.description: Delicate gold leaf suspended in fluid motion, catching light like captured sunbeams.

artworks.title: Marble Dreams
artworks.description: Abstract patterns emerging from the unpredictable nature of water and ink.

artworks.title: Silk Whispers
artworks.description: Soft pastels blending seamlessly, evoking the texture of flowing silk fabric.

artworks.title: Azure Meditation
artworks.description: Deep blues and whites creating a calming, meditative visual experience.

artworks.title: Coral Sunset
artworks.description: Warm coral tones spreading like watercolor clouds at dusk.

photography.title: Photography
photography.subtitle: Minimalist compositions exploring the interplay of light, structure, and negative space

photographs.title: Urban Geometry
photographs.description: Stark architectural lines create a minimalist composition of light and shadow.

photographs.title: Silent Witness
photographs.description: A solitary figure against monumental structures, exploring themes of scale and isolation.

photographs.title: Light Study No. 3
photographs.description: Natural light filtered through geometric forms, creating abstract patterns.

photographs.title: Concrete Poetry
photographs.description: Finding beauty in the raw textures and forms of urban landscapes.

photographs.title: Reflections
photographs.description: Symmetry and repetition in modern architecture, doubled by reflective surfaces.

photographs.title: Monochrome Dreams
photographs.description: High contrast black and white composition emphasizing form over color.
